messages.content: You are a helpful, knowledgeable assistant. Keep responses clear, practical, and concise.

Draft a concise, sincere apology email to my coworker for missing a meeting this morning because I overslept. Take responsibility, acknowledge the impact, suggest two reschedule times, and confirm what I will send before the new meeting. Keep it professional but warm.

Subject: Apology for Missing Our Meeting

Hi [Name],

I’m sorry I missed our meeting this morning. I take full responsibility for the oversight and understand it disrupted your schedule. To make this right, I can
